label: Subagent • live spawn exact one-line output
query: Spawn an agent and have it follow a strict output format.
notes: LIVE. Runs the host + TextSubagentKind against an auto-seeded spawnable agent 'sparky' on the RUN model (the evaluator passes modelId as the spawn override), so spawn is a real cross-model column. seedSpawnableAgent makes the runner create + allow-list 'sparky' for the run and tear it down after. The input demands a strict single-token reply — an instruction-following discriminator. SKIPS only when the run model isn't ready.

subagent.input: Reply with exactly one line containing only the single word READY in uppercase. Output nothing else — no punctuation, no explanation.
